name: Round Gold Mirror
description: Round Gold Mirror — curated for Ibra Casa. Choose size, color, and weight options on the product page. Upload photos later from admin.

faqs.question: How do I hang the Round Gold Mirror safely?
faqs.answer: Use the included mounting hardware on a stud or with suitable wall anchors. For heavy mirrors, we recommend professional installation and checking that your wall can support the weight.

faqs.question: Is the glass shatter-resistant?
faqs.answer: The mirror uses quality glass with a protective backing. Handle carefully during unpacking and avoid impacts to the edges.

faqs.question: Can I choose different sizes or finishes?
faqs.answer: Yes. Available size, color, and weight options are listed on the product page so you can match your space and wall type.

faqs.question: What is the return policy?
faqs.answer: Unopened items in original packaging can be returned within 30 days. Contact support if your item arrives damaged.

name: Wave Pendant Light
description: Wave Pendant Light — curated for Ibra Casa. Choose size, color, and weight options on the product page. Upload photos later from admin.

faqs.question: What bulb does the Wave Pendant Light use?
faqs.answer: It is compatible with standard LED bulbs (bulb sold separately unless noted). Check the product specs for max wattage and base type before purchase.

faqs.question: Is assembly required?
faqs.answer: Light assembly may be needed for the shade, stem, or mounting plate. Clear instructions are included in the box.

faqs.question: Can this be used with a dimmer switch?
faqs.answer: Most of our lighting works with compatible LED dimmers when paired with a dimmable bulb. Confirm your switch and bulb are dimmable for best results.

faqs.question: How do I clean the fixture?
faqs.answer: Turn off power and wipe with a soft dry cloth. Avoid harsh cleaners on metal finishes and glass shades.
